title: Astral Tech
description: This assembly is a techno-magical adventure. You will be able to explore this new world and new planets.
body:
_Please Install [FTB Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge/files/5364190) ｜ [FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge/files/5513826) ｜ [FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge/files/5267190) Manually! Otherwise, they won't work for you._

# Modpack Description
🌟 Immerse yourself in an exciting techno-magical adventure with our modpack, combining the world of Minecraft and the vast expanse of space. The main feature of our modpack is a unique quest line, where each completed quest brings a random reward. Complete all the quests to finish the modpack and become a true master of techno-magic!

### Modpack Features:

**Exclusive Quest Line:**
- 🏆 Complete unique quests to earn random rewards and upgrades.
- 🎯 Each quest presents a new challenge and adventure, expanding your abilities and knowledge.
- 🏅 Finish all the quests to complete the modpack and become a true master of techno-magic!

**Exploration of the Minecraft World and Space:**
- 🏰 Explore updated dungeons and structures filled with treasures and mysteries.
- 🌾 Develop your farms and homestead using new tools and machinery.
- 🚀 Build your own spacecraft and embark on journeys to other planets and moons.

**Techno-Magic:**
- 🪄 Explore ancient magical artifacts and combine them with advanced technologies.
- ⚙️ Create unique devices and mechanisms using magic and science.
- 🛡️ Enhance your armor and weapons by merging magical spells with high-tech materials.

### Get Ready for New Discoveries:

✨ With our modpack, endless opportunities for exploration and creativity await you. Whether it’s building a space station or studying ancient magical runes, there is something for everyone. Join our community and share your discoveries and adventures!

# Our First Modpack!
We (logikacode, nxyzcio, tinterer, and Hom4ck23) are not professional modpack creators. We are making this pack purely for educational purposes and do not expect it to gain a massive number of downloads. Thank you so much to those who download and play it. We will love you! ❤️
